title: Spagyria
description: Adds potions (and ingredients for them) for most vanilla status effects, that are unobtainable through brewing
body:
[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

**Forge:** [Requires Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)



## Adds potions (and ingredients for them) for most vanilla status effects, that are unobtainable through brewing

### List of potions you can brew:

- Luck
- Bad Luck
- Wither
- Health Boost
- Absorption
- Haste
- Mining Fatigue
- Resistance
- Blindness
- Dolphin's Grace
- Nausea
- Saturation
- Hunger
- Glowing
- Darkness
- Levitation

### Recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Awkward Potion + Four Leaf Clover ====> Luck Potion
- Luck Potion + Fermented Spider Eye ====> Bad Luck Potion
- Awkward Potion + Wither Skeleton Bone ====> Wither Potion
- Awkward Potion + Red Prismarine Crystals ====> Health Boost Potion
- Awkward Potion + Golden Apple ====> Absorption Potion
- Awkward Potion + Silverfish Skin ====> Haste Potion
- Haste Potion + Fermented Spider Eye ====> Mining Fatigue Potion
- Awkward Potion + Ender Dragon Scale ====> Resistance Potion
- Awkward Potion + Bat Eye ====> Blindness Potion
- Awkward Potion + Dolphin Fin ====> Dolphin's Grace Potion
- Awkward Potion + Poisonous Potato ====> Nausea Potion
- Awkward Potion + Polar Bear Liver ====> Saturation Potion
- Saturation Potion + Fermented Spider Eye  ====> Hunger Potion
- Awkward Potion + Glow Ink Sac ====> Glowing Potion
- Glowing Potion + Fermented Spider Eye ====> Darkness Potion
- Slow Falling Potion + Fermented Spider Eye ====> Levitation Potion

</details>





### How to get ingredients:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Four Leaf Clover** - drops from grass (chance is really low)

**Wither Skeleton Bone** - drops from Wither Skeletons

**Red Prismarine Crystals** - drops from Elder Guardians (always) and Guardians (low chance)

**Silverfish Skin** - drops from Silverfishes

**Bat Eye** - drops from Bats

**Dolphin Fin** - drops from Dolphins

**Polar Bear Liver** - drops from Polar Bears

**Ender Dragon Scale** - can be crafted from Dragon Head

</details>
